name: Orchid Malevolence
description: A garnet rod constructed from the essence of a fire demon.

abilities.name: Soul Burn
abilities.description: Silences a target enemy for a while. At the end of the duration, a portion of all damage they took during the silence is dealt to them again, as magical damage. Cooldown: 18. Mana Cost: 125. Cast Range: 900. Accumulated Damage: 30%. Duration: 5.
